summary.zh-CN: 管理 xiaozhi.me 智能体、设备、音色与对话历史
summary.en: Manage xiaozhi.me agents, devices, voices, and chat history

description.zh-CN: 封装 xiaozhi.me 控制台 API，管理智能体、设备、音色与对话历史；内置会话助手，支持自然语言操作。
description.en: Wraps the xiaozhi.me console API to manage agents, devices, voices, and chat history. Includes an in-app assistant for natural-language operations.
